channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:

item.title: Microsoft denies Copilot is only for entertainment purpose, after its own document says do not trust AI - Windows Latest
item.description:
1. Microsoft denies Copilot is only for entertainment purpose, after its own document says do not trust AI  Windows Latest
  2. Copilot is ‘for entertainment purposes only,’ according to Microsoft’s terms of use  TechCrunch
  3. Even AI Companies Know Their Models Can’t Be Trusted  Medium
  4. Microsoft says Copilot is for entertainment purposes only, not serious use — firm pushing AI hard to consumers and businesses tells users not to rely on it for important advice  Tom's Hardware
  5. Copilot Terms Claim Microsoft's AI Is for 'Entertainment Purposes Only'  PCMag
